message.content:
@startuml
title UML Diagram: Class VariableRelationship in Context

skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam roundcorner 12
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam linetype ortho

skinparam class {
  BorderColor #666666
  BackgroundColor #F7F7F7
  FontColor black
}

' Main highlighted class
class "Conceptual::\nVariableRelationship" as VariableRelationship #FFD400 {
  identifier : [[Identifier]]
  semantics : [[ControlledVocabularyEntry]]
}

' Related classes
class "Conceptual::\n[[ConceptualVariable]]" as ConceptualVariable #F7F7F7
class "Conceptual::\n[[VariableStructure]]" as VariableStructure #F7F7F7
class "CollectionsPattern::\n[[MemberRelationship]]" as MemberRelationship #F7F7F7

' Layout hints
ConceptualVariable -[hidden]- VariableRelationship
VariableRelationship -[hidden]- VariableStructure
VariableStructure -[hidden]- MemberRelationship

' Relationships
VariableRelationship --> ConceptualVariable : hasSource
VariableRelationship --> ConceptualVariable : hasTarget
VariableStructure --> VariableRelationship : has

VariableRelationship ..> MemberRelationship : \u00ABRefine\u00BB

@enduml
